# Clever Brand Identity

> Hosted source of truth for Clever-branded apps, agents, and design reviews.

Use these files before creating or reviewing Clever apps:

- [Brand guidelines markdown](/brand-guidelines.md): Agent-readable brand rules.
- [Brand guidelines JSON](/brand-guidelines.json): Structured brand tokens and sections.
- [Robot prompt](/api/instructions?format=prompt): Pasteable system/developer prompt for app-building agents.
- [MCP endpoint](/api/mcp): Streamable HTTP MCP server with brand resources, prompts, and tools.
- [Human docs](/docs/robot-instructions.md): Setup instructions for people and robots.

Important constraints:

- Use official Clever logo and font assets when shipping public work.
- Do not reuse source-deck example photos or illustrations in public-facing communications without separate rights approval.
- If there is a conflict between a generated app and the hosted guidelines, the hosted guidelines win.
